title: Pokepuram !
description: PokéPuram is the ultimate Cobblemon server combining classic Pokémon mechanics with vanilla Minecraft survival. Battle, capture, and trade Cobblemon in an active, lag-free community designed for competitive trainers.
body:
🧬 POKEPURAM-SMP — THE CUTTING-EDGE COBBLEMON ECOSYSTEM 🧬


                        ⚡Real Quick | Optimized | Unfettered⚡


                            👇Explore the features below👇



Welcome to Pokepuram SMP — The Ultimate Pokémon MMO Experience!


We have moved beyond basic survival to build a meticulously crafted world where strategy, community, and innovation meet. Engineered for dedicated trainers, Pokepuram offers a highly immersive, entirely unrestricted ecosystem.


🌍 A TRUE POKÉMON WORLD INSIDE MINECRAFT

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

Minecraft meets Pokémon in our most ambitious environment ever built.

⭐ ALL 1025+ Pokémon Available: Zero restrictions. Build your ultimate team.

⭐ Natural Spawns: Legendaries, Mythicals, Paradox, and Ultra Beasts spawn naturally.

⭐ Immersive AI Neural Link: Speak directly with your Pokémon! They learn, converse, and   develop unique personalities based on your interactions.

⭐ Ancient Summoning: Discover hidden altars and monuments to call upon ancient species.

⭐ Living Dex Ready: Massively expanded PC storage (1200+ slots) for serious collectors.

⭐ Reactive World: Wild Pokémon and NPCs adapt, react, and respond to your presence.

⚔️ ADVANCED BATTLE SYSTEM & COMBAT

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

A battle framework designed for genuine competitive depth.

✔ Mega Evolution 

✔ Dynamax & Gigantamax 

✔ Z-Moves 

✔ Terastallization 

✔ Alpha Pokémon & Primal Forms

✔ Tiered Gym Hierarchy & Progression

✔ Multiplayer Raid Dens & Custom Boss Events
This is not vanilla Cobblemon. This is high-stakes, tactical Pokémon battling.

🏛️ EXCLUSIVE ADVENTURE & FEATURES

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

You are entering a fully realized MMO landscape.

🔥 Professional Breeding: Advanced genetics and daycares for perfect IV hunting.

🔥 Secret Bases: Establish and build hidden operational headquarters across the map.

🔥 Advanced Logistics: Master your inventory with digital storage networks and high-capacity backpacks.

🔥 Tactical Progression: Earn high-tier rewards through Research Tasks, Daily Quests, and the Trainer Battle Pass.

🔥 World Expansion: A massive world border filled with custom PokéStops, encampments, and rare loot structures.

🌐 MULTIPLAYER & COMMUNITY FOCUSED

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

🌍 Universal Connectivity: Every Mode is securely supported. Every trainer is welcome.

📈 Macro-Economy: A completely player-driven market with banking, currency, and a dynamic stock market.

🤝 Global Trade System: Secure player-to-player trading and auction houses.

🗣️ Social Grid: Integrated Proximity Voice Chat and real-time Discord synchronization.

🎊 Active Community: Frequent tournaments, competitive leaderboards, and seasonal events.


🔥 WHY CHOOSE POKEPURAM?

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

Unlike other servers that lock features or restrict spawns, Pokepuram gives you:

✔ Full Pokédex Access

✔ No Content Paywalls

✔ Advanced AI Companions

✔ A Fair, Balanced Economy
Built for long-term survival. Built for serious trainers. Built for the community.



🎮 SERVER INFO & CONNECTION

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬


🏆 The Official Pokepuram Multiplayer Experience

🌐 IP Address: pokepuram.2bd.net:14960

🔗 Discord: https://discord.gg/ype5GdmWwa

🛠️ Version: 1.21.1 Fabric (Cobblemon 1.7.3)


POKEPURAM SMP — Precision. Performance. Power.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬
